home.badge: All your schedules. One smart platform.
home.subtitle: SuperPlanify helps people and organizations manage schedules, changes and notifications in one place.

allSchedules.title: All schedules
allSchedules.description: Bring school, work, training and personal schedules together in one place.

realTimeUpdates.title: Real-time updates
realTimeUpdates.description: Stay aligned when classes, sessions or events move.

workflows.title: Frictionless workflows
workflows.description: Replace scattered emails, WhatsApp groups and hallway decisions with structured requests.

peopleTeams.title: Built for people & teams
peopleTeams.description: Join existing schedules as an individual, or create and manage an organization.
